experiences.description: Built full-stack web applications using React, TypeScript, Node.js, and MongoDB for European clients. Architected and developed Heirloom, an AI-powered system featuring dual-memory architecture. Optimized API performance by 40% using Redis caching and MongoDB indexing, and deployed systems using AWS EC2, Docker, and GitHub Actions CI/CD.
Completed a 6-month intensive web development program covering React, Node.js, MongoDB, and Express to validate self-taught web engineering and database expertise.
Explored the fundamentals of web architecture, starting with HTML, CSS, PHP, and Laravel 10/MySQL. Transitioned to JavaScript, TypeScript, and modern asynchronous programming patterns.
Acquired engineering foundations, systems logic, and problem-solving principles in Mymensingh, Bangladesh.
